
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
makeWidth = function(inputWidth) {
  if (inputWidth>1800) {
    return 1200
  }
  if (inputWidth>1700) {
    return 1100
  }
  if (inputWidth>1600) {
    return 1000
  }
  if (inputWidth>1500) {
    return 900
  }
  if (inputWidth>1400) {
    return 800
  }
  if (inputWidth>1300) {
    return 750
  }
  if (inputWidth>1200) {
    return 700
  }
  if (inputWidth>1100) {
    return 650
  }
  if (inputWidth>1000) {
    return 600
  }
  if (inputWidth>900) {
    return 550
  }
  if (inputWidth>800) {
    return 500
  }
  else {
    return 300
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
germanLocale = d3.formatLocale({
  decimal: ",",
  thousands: "",
  grouping: [3], 
  currency: ["€", " "],
})

hexToRgb = function(hex) {
  const bigint = parseInt(hex.replace(/^#/, ""), 16)
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255
  const b = bigint & 255
  return `(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
colors = [
  "#72bb6f",
  "#559bd5",
  "#f3d039",
  "#c3423f", 
  "#12a7e7",
  "#96b428",
  "#559e8f",
  "#f3d039",
  "#559e8f",
  "#2d5b5e",
]
colors_diverging = [
  "#2d76b3", 
  "#559bd5", 
  "#99c4e6",
  "#bbd7ee", 
  "#ddebf7", 
  "#e3f1e2", 
  "#c7e3c6", 
  "#abd6a9", 
  "#72bb6f", 
  "#4b9847",
]
colors_npr = [
  "#D62021",
  "#000000",
  "#237BBD",
]
colors_burger = [
  "#D62300",
  "#FF8732",
  "#502314",
  "#F5EBDC",
  "#198737",
  "#FFAA00",
]
colors_oekostrom = [
  "#05a56f",
  "#eb6761",
  "#b4e800",
  "#26c4d3",
  "#d28cec",
  "#aaaaaa",
  "#ffffff",
  "#ffd925"
]
colors_fiw = [
  "#3e5ba2", // deep blue
  "#df5154", // vibrant red
  "#4caf50", // green
  "#ffb74d", // orange
  "#9575cd", // purple
  "#26c6da", // cyan
  "#f06292", // pink
  "#ffd54f"  // yellow
]
```
